name: Pachi Pulusu
steps: Soak tamarind in warm water and squeeze out a thin extract into a wide bowl.
Roast the green chillies directly on the flame, crush them, and add to the tamarind water.
Add chopped onion, jaggery, chilli powder, salt and coriander — this pulusu is never cooked.
Crackle mustard, cumin, red chillies and curry leaves in hot oil.
Pour the hot tempering into the raw pulusu — it sizzles loudly — and serve with hot rice.
